news.title: Why The FLSmidth (CPSE:FLS) Story Is Shifting As Pump Strength Meets Valuation Doubts
news.summary: FLSmidth’s fair value estimate in the updated model moves from DKK 566.36 to DKK 583.33, while JPMorgan’s separate decision to cut its price target by DKK 40 shows that views on upside potential are not aligned. The cluster of higher targets in the DKK 545 to DKK 600 range reflects growing confidence among bullish analysts, set against more cautious voices questioning how far the re rating can run
